title: syndyophyllum excelsum
intro: Syndyophyllum excelsum, also known as the Licorice Fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Syndyophyllum excelsum include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
